summary: Smoke-tested Hilltrack NGO backend + frontend. Public pages render with seeded data, admin login/CRUD works, protected endpoints return 401, created event appears on /events, logout clears token and protects /admin.
passed: GET /api/members returns 9 seeded governing body members in correct order (Roshan Lal President, R.C. Kandpal VP, Vaibhav Joshi Secretary, etc.)
POST /api/auth/login with admin/hilltrack2026 returns JWT token; wrong password returns 401
POST /api/members, PUT /api/settings, POST /api/upload return 401 without Authorization header
POST /api/events with Bearer token creates event successfully
GET /api/settings returns 200 with default about/aims/contact/email data
Public /members page renders 9 member-card-* tiles with zero edit/delete/add controls visible
Wrong admin credentials shows toast error and stays on /admin/login
Correct credentials redirect to /admin dashboard; all 6 tabs present (members, events, achievements, schools, gallery, settings)
Adding a new event via Events tab (add-new-btn -> form -> save-btn) creates event and it appears on public /events page
Logout button redirects to /admin/login and clears token; subsequent direct /admin access redirects back to /admin/login
